productDisplayName: Wildcraft Unisex Gear for Life Green Waist Bag
description: Get stylish with this wildcraft waist-bag! Wear this to your college and shopping sprees. Perfect even for those short day trips, this bag comes with ample space to stash away your stuff and carry it with much ease and comfort both as a duffel bag or as a sling one.Measurement Height: 25 cmWidth: 33 cmDepth: 13 cmWarranty: 5 yearsMade of  450D polyester for durability and comfort One main zippered compartment with a divider flap, front slash zippered pocket, balloon front pocket and two meshed water bottle holdersDetachable, adjustable and padded waist beltDetachable shoulder straps for easy handling  Bar tacked on specialized machines for enhanced durabilityHas quality zippers and runners for long lifeCareStore backpack in a dry placeonly hand wash using luke warm soapy waterPlease note that the thread colour in the brand logo may vary from the image shown
